content: This issue has been documented, but we are still investigating the cause.<:dead:1356082627509092372>

Wanted to address this issue as well. Seems like it is only tied to Vortice. What exactly happens is that, after killing an enemy with her "Vortex! Shell!" ability, she disappears right away. It only happens if she actually has a kill, as can be seen in the videos provided. She's also disappeared completely during her ult today. Don't know why that happened tho.

Update: She disappeared again without killing an enemy, so it's kind of random. But still after using "Vortex! Shell!".
